description_long: This object is a modern military-style jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and sharply swept-back wings. The wings are mid-mounted and feature a moderate sweep, giving the aircraft a sleek, aerodynamic profile. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and conventional horizontal stabilizers, forming a classic tail design. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a light-colored canopy, suggesting a single or dual-seat configuration. Two jet engines are mounted under the wings, visible from the side and front views, indicating a twin-engine setup. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with a single nose wheel and two main wheels under the wings.
description: A sleek, swept-wing jet airplane with a forward cockpit, twin underwing engines, and a conventional tail. The body is mostly dark gray with a light canopy and visible tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, swept-back wings, and the single vertical stabilizer at the tail.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, cockpit canopy, underwing engines, and landing gear.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, twin engines under the wings, and the main landing gear.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the tail, swept wings, cockpit, and underwing engines.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with moderately swept wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main gear units under the wings.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely single or dual-seat.
